nodes.context: Major outlaw motorcycle gang involved in drug trafficking and organized crime, active in Quebec, Canada.

edges.evidence_quote: The Quebec Biker War ... was a gang war in Montreal ... between the Quebec branch of the Hells Angels and the Rock Machine.
edges.context: The two groups were engaged in a violent gang war from 1994 to 2002.

edges.evidence_quote: Rock Machine sought international help from The Bandidos
edges.context: Rock Machine sought help from Bandidos during the war.

edges.evidence_quote: The Rock Machine merges with the Bandidos in 2001
edges.context: Rock Machine merged with Bandidos in 2001.

edges.context: Rockers Motor Club is a puppet club of the Hells Angels.

edges.context: Death Riders is a puppet club of the Hells Angels.

edges.context: Rock Machine was a founding member of the Alliance to Fight the Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine were the most visible parts of the Alliance to Fight the Angels
edges.context: Pelletier Clan was a member of the Alliance to Fight the Angels.

edges.context: Dark Circle provided financial backing to the Alliance to Fight the Angels.
